title: HBO Search Trends Highlight Game of Thrones News
description: Recent search trends for HBO in Australia focus on new Game of Thrones releases and delays reported by IMDb, IGN Africa, and Polygon.com.

sources.title: New Official Game of Thrones Release is Bringing Back Jon Snow
Game of Thrones: War for Westeros Release Date Delayed to Early 2027
Game of Thrones is finally getting the PC game we've been waiting for, but it's delayed to 2027

sections.heading: Jon Snow Return
paragraphs: According to IMDb, a new official Game of Thrones release is bringing back Jon Snow.

sections.heading: Game Release Delays
paragraphs: IGN Africa reports that the release date for 'Game of Thrones: War for Westeros' has been delayed to early 2027.
Polygon.com states that the PC game fans have been waiting for is delayed to 2027.

sections.heading: Search Data Details
paragraphs: The search data for the term 'hbo' in the AU region shows a lower bound of 1,000 searches. The snapshot for this information was taken on July 20, 2026.

faq.q: What is the latest news regarding Jon Snow?
faq.a: IMDb reports that a new official Game of Thrones release is bringing back Jon Snow.

faq.q: When is the Game of Thrones PC game releasing?
faq.a: According to Polygon.com, the PC game has been delayed to 2027.
Yes, IGN Africa reports that the release date for 'Game of Thrones: War for Westeros' has been delayed to early 2027.
